query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_teachers,
  COUNT(cityId) as teachers_with_city,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(cityId) as teachers_without_city
FROM teachers;

SELECT cityId, COUNT(*) as count
FROM teachers
GROUP BY cityId
ORDER BY count DESC;
